Interface ParameterizedFacade

All Superinterfaces:
edu.iu.type.IuParameterizedElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConstructorFacade, ExecutableBase, MethodFacade, ParameterFacade, ParameterizedElement, TypeFacade, TypeTemplate
interface ParameterizedFacade extends edu.iu.type.IuParameterizedElement
Implementation replacement for IuParameterizedElement to enforce all type parameters to be implemented by TypeFacade.
